description: This 3D model depicts a simple, monochromatic bedroom set in a minimalist style. It includes a bed with a headboard and bedding, a small bedside table with a rounded top, and a tall, narrow bookshelf unit. The bed is adorned with pillows and a draped comforter, suggesting a cozy and inviting space. To the right of the bed, a compact sofa with two cushions and a low coffee table are positioned, creating a small seating area. The overall aesthetic is clean and uncluttered, emphasizing functionality and a sense of calm. The wall art, a small abstract sculpture, adds a subtle artistic touch without disrupting the minimalist theme. The lighting in the scene is soft, casting gentle shadows that highlight the forms of the furniture.
